articles.title: Headline inflation surges to 4.6 per cent as higher fuel prices bite

children.content: Headline inflation surges to 4.6 per cent in March, but underlying inflation remains at 3.3 per cent.

image.altText: old hand holding cash money notes with a list of bills on a notebook, calculator, glasses, lace tablecloth and cup of coffee

children.content: ABS data shows a rise in inflation to 4.6 per cent in March, the highest since September 2023 when the nation's economy was rebounding after the COVID-19 pandemic. Follow live.

items.title: Police killer Dezi Freeman had hundreds of child abuse files

children.content: Police killer Dezi Freeman was on the verge of having his secret stash of child abuse material discovered when he gunned down two officers outside his makeshift home.

image.altText: Dezi Freeman pictured outside a court in Wangaratta.

items.title: Former ASIO chief raised questions about assessment of Bondi gunman

children.content: While advising the royal commission examining the Bondi Beach terrorist attack, the former head of Australia's domestic intelligence agency questioned whether early assessments of gunman Naveed Akram were sufficiently rigorous.

items.title: UAE exit from OPEC another disruption to the fragile oil market

items.title: Rebel Wilson accused of dumping her mobile to avoid handing over key texts

items.title: Increasingly desperate search for 5yo Sharon Granites continues for fourth day

children.content: Up to 130 volunteers are expected to join the increasingly desperate search for missing Alice Springs girl Sharon Granites today after the five-year-old's disappearance at the weekend.

articles.title: As search for missing 5yo Sharon continues, a clearer picture of that night emerges

children.content: Five-year-old Sharon Granites vanished from an Alice Springs town camp late on Saturday night, with police alleging she has been abducted. Here's what we know about the night she went missing.

image.altText: young girl in blue shirt sits in chair holding arms out front

articles.title: Criminal history of man police are searching for over missing 5yo girl revealed

children.content: A man being sought in connection with the alleged abduction of five-year-old Sharon Granites near Alice Springs has a long history of violence and prison time in the Northern Territory.

articles.title: Former FBI director charged over alleged social media photo threat to Trump

items.title: Childcare group G8 to close 10pc of centres after child abuse scandal

items.title: Sydney council to investigate banning short-term rentals

items.title: Evidence of 25-million-year-old platypuses with teeth found in outback

children.content: Researchers have discovered ancient platypus fossils in outback South Australia, where they are believed to have lived with lungfish, flamingos and freshwater dolphins. They also had major a difference from the modern species: well-formed teeth.

items.title: Don't assume El Niño warming will bring record heat

children.content: Australia's weather pattern is in a reset, and the weather events happening this month will act like the ingredients to determine the flavour of our climate for the rest of the year.

items.title: 'Double-headed monster' set to push up prices at the check-out

children.content: Companies that use plastic packaging are facing price pressures and supply disruptions, which they warn will likely mean higher costs for consumers. The cost of food-grade resin out of Singapore, which is used in milk bottles, has increased 110 per cent since the start of the Middle East war.

items.title: Family says grandmother's death after weight-loss surgery preventable
